Thank you for the numbers, Emmanuele. Now the future. What are your plans for the next quarter?
Our goal is the product approval in dermatology. We are going to announce it in May.
Good. And what is the strategy in the private market?
We are going to focus on the private hospitals. I am going to organize twenty new meetings.
Excellent. And the reimbursement decision, when is it going to arrive?
In July. But it depends on the market conditions.
Understood. In August, we are meeting your field team. Are you going to present the business plan?
Yes. I am going to present it on the second day. The deadline for the document is April 30, and I am going to send it before.

Hello Emmanuele. Marc Dubois, from Paris. I have the dates for August, and I want to tell you the plan. We are going to arrive in Brazil on August twenty-fourth. On the first day, we are going to visit two hospitals with your field team. On the second day, you are going to present the business plan for Brazil. Twenty minutes, no more. And in the evening, we are having dinner with the global immunology team. That dinner is confirmed, so please come. One more thing. I am not going to ask you for fifty slides. I am going to ask you three questions. What is the goal, what is the strategy, and what is the deadline. Think about it. Talk to you soon.

Good morning, everyone. Claire Bennett here, from the global immunology team. This is a short message about the calendar for the next quarter, so you can organize your agenda. In May, we are going to announce the product approval in dermatology. This is very good news for our patients. In June, we are having the quarterly review, and every country is going to present the numbers. Brazil, you are first again. In July, the reimbursement decision is going to arrive, and it is going to change the plan for the public market. And in August, the global team is traveling to Brazil. The dates are confirmed. So, what are your plans for the next quarter? Please send me your business plan before the end of April. Thank you.

In April, I am going to send the business plan to Paris. In May, we are going to announce the product approval in dermatology. In June, I am going to present the numbers at the quarterly review. In July, the reimbursement decision is going to arrive. On August twenty-fourth, we are having dinner with the global team in Brazil.
